overview: RegenCen provides hormone optimization therapy and regenerative medicine for midlife and older men and women. Treatment is physician-led and includes detailed testing, personalized dosing, and ongoing lab monitoring.
highlights: Hormone pellets with 5-6 month release cycle
PRF injections for joints and sexual health
Medical weight loss with GLP-1 medications
targetAudience: Midlife and older men and women seeking to optimize hormones and address symptoms like fatigue, poor sleep, brain fog, and low libido.
